from pyspark.sql import functions as F
import re
import uuid

# =========================================
# Paths
# =========================================
BASE_PATH = "abfss://mpesc@pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz.dfs.core.windows.net"

CASE_OFFICER_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-EXTRACT/CaseOfficer.csv"
ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Entra"

OUT_DEBUG_MATCH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/User/debug_case_officer_entra_match"
OUT_USERS_LOAD = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/User/users_for_load"
OUT_CASE_MAP = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/User/case_officer_case_map"

print("CASE_OFFICER_PATH:", CASE_OFFICER_PATH)
print("ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH:", ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)
print("OUT_DEBUG_MATCH:", OUT_DEBUG_MATCH)
print("OUT_USERS_LOAD:", OUT_USERS_LOAD)
print("OUT_CASE_MAP:", OUT_CASE_MAP)

case_officer_df = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .option("inferSchema", True)
    .csv(CASE_OFFICER_PATH)
)

print("Case officer source rows:", case_officer_df.count())
print("Case officer source columns:", case_officer_df.columns)
display(case_officer_df.limit(20))

entra_raw = (
    spark.read
    .option("multiline", "true")
    .json(ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)
)

only_corrupt = (
    entra_raw.columns == ["_corrupt_record"]
    or set(entra_raw.columns) == {"_corrupt_record"}
)

if not only_corrupt:
    print("Parsed Entra as JSON")
    print("Entra raw columns:", entra_raw.columns)
else:
    print("JSON parse failed, using text fallback")

    txt = spark.read.text(ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)

    blob = (
        txt.agg(F.concat_ws("\n", F.collect_list("value")).alias("blob"))
        .collect()[0]["blob"]
    )

    chunks = re.findall(
        r'"value"\s*:\s*\[(.*?)\]\s*(?:,|\})',
        blob,
        flags=re.DOTALL
    )

    if len(chunks) == 0:
        raise Exception('Could not find any "value": [...] arrays in Entra export text.')

    arrays = ["[" + c + "]" for c in chunks]
    rdd = spark.sparkContext.parallelize(arrays)
    entra_raw = spark.read.json(rdd)

    print("Fallback Entra raw columns:", entra_raw.columns)

if "value" in entra_raw.columns:
    entra_users = (
        entra_raw
        .select(F.explode("value").alias("u"))
        .select("u.*")
    )
else:
    entra_users = entra_raw

print("Entra rows:", entra_users.count())
print("Entra columns:", entra_users.columns)
display(entra_users.limit(20))

case_officer_clean = (
    case_officer_df
    .select(
        nullify_str(F.col("caseOfficerId")).alias("legacyId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("CaseReference")).alias("caseReference"),
        nullify_str(F.col("CaseNodeId")).alias("caseNodeId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("FirstName")).alias("firstName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("LastName")).alias("lastName"),
        F.concat_ws(
            " ",
            nullify_str(F.col("FirstName")),
            nullify_str(F.col("LastName"))
        ).alias("caseOfficerName"),
        F.lower(nullify_str(F.col("caseOfficerEmail"))).alias("coEmailAddress")
    )
    .withColumn(
        "coEmailAddressNorm",
        F.regexp_replace(
            F.col("coEmailAddress"),
            r"@pins\.gsi\.gov\.uk$",
            "@planninginspectorate.gov.uk"
        )
    )
)

print("Case officer clean rows:", case_officer_clean.count())
display(case_officer_clean.limit(20))

entra_clean = (
    entra_users
    .select(
        nullify_str(F.col("id")).alias("idpUserId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("employeeId")).alias("employeeId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("displayName")).alias("displayName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("givenName")).alias("givenName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("surname")).alias("surname"),
        F.lower(nullify_str(F.col("mail"))).alias("mail"),
        F.lower(nullify_str(F.col("userPrincipalName"))).alias("userPrincipalName"),
        F.col("otherMails")
    )
    .filter(F.col("idpUserId").isNotNull())
)

print("Entra clean rows:", entra_clean.count())
display(entra_clean.limit(20))

debug_match_df = (
    case_officer_clean.alias("co")
    .join(
        entra_clean.alias("en"),
        (
            (F.col("co.coEmailAddressNorm") == F.col("en.mail")) |
            (F.col("co.coEmailAddressNorm") == F.col("en.userPrincipalName"))
        ),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("co.legacyId"),
        F.col("co.caseReference"),
        F.col("co.caseNodeId"),
        F.col("co.firstName"),
        F.col("co.lastName"),
        F.col("co.caseOfficerName"),
        F.col("co.coEmailAddress"),
        F.col("co.coEmailAddressNorm"),
        F.col("en.idpUserId"),
        F.col("en.employeeId"),
        F.col("en.displayName").alias("entraDisplayName"),
        F.col("en.givenName"),
        F.col("en.surname"),
        F.col("en.mail"),
        F.col("en.userPrincipalName"),
        F.when(F.col("en.idpUserId").isNotNull(), F.lit("matched"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("unmatched"))
         .alias("matchStatus")
    )
)

print("Debug match rows:", debug_match_df.count())
display(debug_match_df.limit(50))
debug_match_df.groupBy("matchStatus").count().show()

users_for_load = (
    debug_match_df
    .select(
        F.col("legacyId"),
        F.col("idpUserId"),
        F.col("employeeId"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("entraDisplayName"), F.col("caseOfficerName")).alias("displayName"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("givenName"), F.col("firstName")).alias("givenName"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("surname"), F.col("lastName")).alias("surname"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("mail"), F.col("coEmailAddressNorm")).alias("email"),
        F.col("userPrincipalName")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyId"])
    .withColumn(
        "id",
        uuid_udf(F.concat_ws("||", F.lit("user"), F.col("legacyId")))
    )
    .select(
        F.col("id"),            # PEAS User.id
        F.col("idpUserId"),     # Entra GUID, can be null
        F.col("legacyId"),      # Horizon user id
        F.col("employeeId"),
        F.col("displayName"),
        F.col("givenName"),
        F.col("surname"),
        F.col("email"),
        F.col("userPrincipalName")
    )
)

print("Users for load rows:", users_for_load.count())
display(users_for_load.limit(50))

user_id_lookup = (
    users_for_load
    .select(
        F.col("legacyId").alias("u_legacyId"),
        F.col("id").alias("userId")
    )
)

case_officer_case_map = (
    debug_match_df.alias("dm")
    .join(
        user_id_lookup.alias("ul"),
        F.col("dm.legacyId") == F.col("ul.u_legacyId"),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("dm.caseReference"),
        F.col("dm.caseNodeId"),
        F.col("dm.legacyId"),
        F.col("dm.caseOfficerName"),
        F.col("dm.coEmailAddress"),
        F.col("dm.coEmailAddressNorm"),
        F.col("dm.idpUserId"),
        F.col("ul.userId"),
        F.col("dm.matchStatus")
    )
)

print("Case officer case map rows:", case_officer_case_map.count())
display(case_officer_case_map.limit(50))

CASES_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_df = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(CASES_PATH)
)

print("Cases rows:", cases_df.count())
print("Cases columns:", cases_df.columns)

display(cases_df.limit(20))

case_officer_case_map_batch = (
    case_officer_case_map.alias("m")
    .join(
        cases_df.select(
            F.col("Case ID").cast("string").alias("batchCaseNodeId"),
            F.col("GUID").alias("caseId")
        ).dropDuplicates(["batchCaseNodeId"]),
        F.col("m.caseNodeId").cast("string") == F.col("batchCaseNodeId"),
        "inner"
    )
    .drop("batchCaseNodeId")
)

print("Filtered case map rows:", case_officer_case_map_batch.count())
display(case_officer_case_map_batch.limit(50))

user_unique_base = (
    debug_match_df
    .select(
        F.col("legacyId"),
        F.col("idpUserId"),
        F.col("employeeId"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("entraDisplayName"), F.col("caseOfficerName")).alias("displayName"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("givenName"), F.col("firstName")).alias("givenName"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("surname"), F.col("lastName")).alias("surname"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("mail"), F.col("coEmailAddressNorm")).alias("email"),
        F.col("userPrincipalName")
    )
    .withColumn(
        "userDedupeKey",
        F.when(
            F.col("email").isNotNull(),
            F.lower(F.trim(F.col("email")))
        ).otherwise(
            F.concat(F.lit("legacyId::"), F.col("legacyId"))
        )
    )
    .filter(
        (F.col("idpUserId").isNotNull()) &
        (F.trim(F.col("idpUserId")) != "") &
        (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("idpUserId"))) != "undefined")
    )
)

display(user_unique_base.limit(20))

user_unique_df = (
    user_unique_base
    .dropDuplicates(["userDedupeKey"])
    .withColumn(
        "id",
        uuid_udf(F.concat_ws("||", F.lit("user"), F.col("userDedupeKey")))
    )
)

print("Unique users:", user_unique_df.count())
display(user_unique_df.limit(20))

user_unique_lookup = (
    user_unique_df
    .select(
        F.col("id").alias("userId"),
        F.col("userDedupeKey"),
        F.col("idpUserId")
    )
)

debug_match_with_key = (
    debug_match_df
    .withColumn(
        "userDedupeKey",
        F.when(
            F.coalesce(F.col("mail"), F.col("coEmailAddressNorm")).isNotNull(),
            F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("mail"), F.col("coEmailAddressNorm"))))
        ).otherwise(
            F.concat(F.lit("legacyId::"), F.col("legacyId"))
        )
    )
)

case_officer_case_map_deduped = (
    debug_match_with_key.alias("dm")
    .join(
        user_unique_lookup.alias("ul"),
        "userDedupeKey",
        "left"
    )
)
display(user_unique_lookup.limit(20))
display(case_officer_case_map_deduped.limit(20))

case_user_df = (
    case_officer_case_map_deduped.alias("m")
    .join(
        cases_df.select(
            F.col("Case ID").cast("string").alias("batchCaseNodeId"),
            F.col("GUID").alias("caseId")
        ),
        F.col("m.caseNodeId").cast("string") == F.col("batchCaseNodeId"),
        "inner"
    )
    .drop("batchCaseNodeId")
)

display(case_user_df.limit(20))

from collections import Counter

cols = case_user_df.columns
counts = Counter()
new_cols = []

for c in cols:
    counts[c] += 1
    if counts[c] == 1:
        new_cols.append(c)
    else:
        new_cols.append(f"{c}_{counts[c]}")

case_user_df_renamed = case_user_df.toDF(*new_cols)

print(case_user_df_renamed.columns)
display(case_user_df_renamed.limit(5))

OUT_USERS_LOAD = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/User/users_for_load"
OUT_CASE_MAP = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/User/case_officer_case_map"

case_user_df_clean = case_user_df_renamed.select(
    "caseReference",
    "caseNodeId",
    "caseId",
    "legacyId",
    "userId",
    "idpUserId",
    "caseOfficerName",
    "coEmailAddressNorm",
    "matchStatus"
)


(
    user_unique_df
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUT_USERS_LOAD)
)

(
    case_user_df_clean
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUT_CASE_MAP)
)

print("Wrote users to:", OUT_USERS_LOAD)
print("Wrote case map to:", OUT_CASE_MAP)
